properties.name: palette
properties.summary: 指定当前组件采用的色盘
properties.remarks:
如果指定了此值，那么在组件内部的 CSS 引用的诸如
`--palette-bg`
等 CSS 变量都将使用此色盘对应的颜色。
如果是 undefined，则表示从父元素继承。

properties.name: class
properties.summary: 为组件的根元素指定 CSS 类名
properties.remarks:
为当前组件的根元素指定 CSS 类名。该值始终是最后添加到元素的 class 属性上的，
以保证此类能启作用，当然也有可能会修改组件的定义的一些 CSS 样式。

properties.name: style
properties.summary: 组件根元素的样式
properties.remarks:
相对于
，一些简短的样式设置，直接使用此属性更方便，
还有一些自定义的样式变量也可以使用此属性设置。

properties.name: "aria-activedescendant"
properties.summary:
Identifies the currently active element when DOM focus is on a composite widget, textbox,
group, or application.

properties.name: "aria-atomic"
properties.summary:
Indicates whether assistive technologies will present all, or only parts of, the changed
region based on the change notifications defined by the aria-relevant attribute.

properties.name: "aria-braillelabel"
properties.summary:
Similar to the global aria-label. Defines a string value that labels the current element,
which is intended to be converted into Braille.

properties.name: "aria-brailleroledescription"
properties.summary:
Defines a human-readable, author-localized abbreviated description for the role of an element
intended to be converted into Braille. Braille is not a one-to-one transliteration of letters
and numbers, but rather it includes various abbreviations, contractions, and characters that
represent words (known as logograms).


Instead of converting long role descriptions to Braille, the aria-brailleroledescription
attribute allows for providing an abbreviated version of the aria-roledescription value,
which is a human-readable, author-localized description for the role of an element, for
improved user experience with braille interfaces.

properties.name: "aria-autocomplete"
properties.summary:
Indicates whether inputting text could trigger display of one or more predictions of the
user's intended value for an input and specifies how predictions would be presented if they
are made.

properties.name: "aria-busy"
properties.summary:
Indicates an element is being modified and that assistive technologies MAY want to wait until
the modifications are complete before exposing them to the user.

properties.name: "aria-checked"
properties.summary: Indicates the current "checked" state of checkboxes, radio buttons, and other widgets.

properties.name: "aria-colcount"
properties.summary: Defines the total number of columns in a table, grid, or treegrid.

properties.name: "aria-colindex"
properties.summary:
Defines an element's column index or position with respect to the total number of columns
within a table, grid, or treegrid.

properties.name: "aria-colindextext"
properties.summary: Defines a human-readable text alternative of the numeric aria-colindex.

properties.name: "aria-colspan"
properties.summary:
Defines the number of columns spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or
treegrid.

properties.name: "aria-controls"
properties.summary:
Identifies the element (or elements) whose contents or presence are controlled by the current
element.

properties.name: "aria-current"
properties.summary:
Indicates the element that represents the current item within a container or set of related
elements.

properties.name: "aria-describedby"
properties.summary: Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.

properties.name: "aria-description"
properties.summary: Defines a string value that describes or annotates the current element.

properties.name: "aria-details"
properties.summary: Identifies the element that provides a detailed, extended description for the object.

properties.name: "aria-disabled"
properties.summary:
Indicates that the element is perceivable but disabled, so it is not editable or otherwise
operable.

properties.name: "aria-dropeffect"
properties.summary:
Indicates what functions can be performed when a dragged object is released on the drop
target.

properties.name: "aria-errormessage"
properties.summary: Identifies the element that provides an error message for the object.

properties.name: "aria-expanded"
properties.summary:
Indicates whether the element, or another grouping element it controls, is currently expanded
or collapsed.

properties.name: "aria-flowto"
properties.summary:
Identifies the next element (or elements) in an alternate reading order of content which, at
the user's discretion, allows assistive technology to override the general default of reading
in document source order.

properties.name: "aria-grabbed"
properties.summary: Indicates an element's "grabbed" state in a drag-and-drop operation.

properties.name: "aria-haspopup"
properties.summary:
Indicates the availability and type of interactive popup element, such as menu or dialog,
that can be triggered by an element.

properties.name: "aria-hidden"
properties.summary: Indicates whether the element is exposed to an accessibility API.

properties.name: "aria-invalid"
properties.summary: Indicates the entered value does not conform to the format expected by the application.

properties.name: "aria-keyshortcuts"
properties.summary:
Indicates keyboard shortcuts that an author has implemented to activate or give focus to an
element.

properties.name: "aria-label"
properties.summary: Defines a string value that labels the current element.

properties.name: "aria-labelledby"
properties.summary: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.

properties.name: "aria-level"
properties.summary: Defines the hierarchical level of an element within a structure.

properties.name: "aria-live"
properties.summary:
Indicates that an element will be updated, and describes the types of updates the user
agents, assistive technologies, and user can expect from the live region.

properties.name: "aria-modal"
properties.summary: Indicates whether an element is modal when displayed.

properties.name: "aria-multiline"
properties.summary: Indicates whether a text box accepts multiple lines of input or only a single line.

properties.name: "aria-multiselectable"
properties.summary:
Indicates that the user may select more than one item from the current selectable
descendants.

properties.name: "aria-orientation"
properties.summary: Indicates whether the element's orientation is horizontal, vertical, or unknown/ambiguous.

properties.name: "aria-owns"
properties.summary:
Identifies an element (or elements) in order to define a visual, functional, or contextual
parent/child relationship between DOM elements where the DOM hierarchy cannot be used to
represent the relationship.

properties.name: "aria-placeholder"
properties.summary:
Defines a short hint (a word or short phrase) intended to aid the user with data entry when
the control has no value. A hint could be a sample value or a brief description of the
expected format.

properties.name: "aria-posinset"
properties.summary:
Defines an element's number or position in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not
required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.

properties.name: "aria-pressed"
properties.summary: Indicates the current "pressed" state of toggle buttons.

properties.name: "aria-readonly"
properties.summary: Indicates that the element is not editable, but is otherwise operable.

properties.name: "aria-relevant"
properties.summary:
Indicates what notifications the user agent will trigger when the accessibility tree within a
live region is modified.
properties.type: "text" | "all" | "additions" | "additions removals" | "additions text" | "removals" | "removals additions" | "removals text" | "text additions" | "text removals" | undefined

properties.name: "aria-required"
properties.summary: Indicates that user input is required on the element before a form may be submitted.

properties.name: "aria-roledescription"
properties.summary: Defines a human-readable, author-localized description for the role of an element.

properties.name: "aria-rowcount"
properties.summary: Defines the total number of rows in a table, grid, or treegrid.

properties.name: "aria-rowindex"
properties.summary:
Defines an element's row index or position with respect to the total number of rows within a
table, grid, or treegrid.

properties.name: "aria-rowindextext"
properties.summary: Defines a human-readable text alternative of aria-rowindex.

properties.name: "aria-rowspan"
properties.summary: Defines the number of rows spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.

properties.name: "aria-selected"
properties.summary: Indicates the current "selected" state of various widgets.

properties.name: "aria-setsize"
properties.summary:
Defines the number of items in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all
elements in the set are present in the DOM.

properties.name: "aria-sort"
properties.summary: Indicates if items in a table or grid are sorted in ascending or descending order.

properties.name: "aria-valuemax"
properties.summary: Defines the maximum allowed value for a range widget.

properties.name: "aria-valuemin"
properties.summary: Defines the minimum allowed value for a range widget.

properties.name: "aria-valuenow"
properties.summary: Defines the current value for a range widget.

properties.name: "aria-valuetext"
properties.summary: Defines the human readable text alternative of aria-valuenow for a range widget.

properties.name: ref
properties.summary: 对当前组件的一些次要操作可能会通过此方法给出

properties.name: tag
properties.summary: 自定义标签

properties.name: spinning
properties.summary: 加载状态

properties.name: indicator
properties.summary: 在加载状态下的指示器

properties.name: overlayClass
properties.summary: 遮罩层的样式
properties.remarks: 默认情况下，遮罩层是一个透明全覆盖的元素。此属性可以修改该元素的样式。
